name: ai-usage-statusbar-gustavohrg-2026
description: VS Code status bar monitor for Claude, Codex, and Copilot usage
author: Gustavo Henrique

aiUsageMonitor.enabledProviders.description: Providers to enable in status bar and refresh cycle. Set empty array to disable all providers.

aiUsageMonitor.enableThresholdColors.description: Enable per-provider warning/critical indicators. For a single enabled provider, threshold color is also applied to the whole status bar item.

aiUsageMonitor.showProviderLetter.description: Show provider letter (C/O/G) next to each provider marker in the status bar.

aiUsageMonitor.providerMarkers.description: Provider-to-marker mapping used in the status bar. Example: { "claude": "🟠", "codex": "🔵", "copilot": "🟩" }

aiUsageMonitor.copilotLookbackDays.description: Copilot usage lookback window in days when estimating token volume and credits. Used when copilotWindowMode is set to lookbackDays.

aiUsageMonitor.copilotWindowMode.description: Copilot usage period mode: rolling lookbackDays window or current calendar month.

aiUsageMonitor.copilotIncludedCredits.description: Included Copilot credits used as denominator for the Copilot percentage metric.

aiUsageMonitor.copilotAutoModel.description: Model to assume for Copilot records logged as auto when estimating credits.

aiUsageMonitor.weeklyExhaustedDisplay.description: When weekly usage is exhausted, show either 100% or days remaining until reset in the status bar.

aiUsageMonitor.warningThreshold.description: Usage percentage threshold where the status bar switches to warning color.

aiUsageMonitor.criticalThreshold.description: Usage percentage threshold where the status bar switches to critical color.

aiUsageMonitor.statusBarColors.description: Status bar color mapping. Supported keys: disabled, warning, critical.
